summary: Comprehensive testing of PropValu v2.6 AI-powered comparable search feature. All core functionalities verified: Landing page loads, valuation form 3-step flow works (/valuar route), AI comparables search returns results from OpenAI + Gemini providers, value calculation works, report generation works.

issues: The review request mentioned /valuacion route but actual route is /valuar - not a bug, just documentation mismatch

passed_tests: API GET /api/health - returns healthy ✅
API GET /api/ - returns version 2.0.0 ✅
API GET /api/valuations/val_5291862e02f7 - returns valuation with AI search results ✅
API search_method = 'ai' ✅
API ai_providers_used includes ['openai', 'gemini'] ✅
API found 14 comparables via AI search ✅
API POST /api/valuations - creates new valuation ✅
API POST /api/valuations/{id}/generate-comparables - generates AI comparables (10-15 results) ✅
API POST /api/valuations/{id}/calculate - calculates value correctly ✅
API POST /api/valuations/{id}/generate-report - generates HTML report ✅
API GET /api/stats - returns platform statistics (71+ valuations) ✅
API GET /api/property-types - returns 7 property types ✅
API 404 for non-existent valuations ✅
UI: Landing page loads with PropValu branding ✅
UI: 'Comenzar Valuación' button navigates to /valuar ✅
UI: Stats show 71+ valuaciones, 95% precision ✅
UI: Valuation form Step 1 (Ubicación) - state, municipality, neighborhood inputs work ✅
UI: LocationMap component with draggable pin works ✅
UI: Map search input and button functional ✅
UI: Step navigation (Siguiente/Anterior buttons) works ✅
UI: Valuation form Step 2 (Inmueble) - property type selection, areas, regime ✅
UI: Valuation form Step 3 (Detalles) - bedrooms, bathrooms, features, photo upload toggle ✅
UI: Submit button 'Generar Valuación' visible ✅
UI: Report page loads valuation result ($7,407,464 MXN) ✅
UI: Report shows Confianza: ALTO, price/sqm, value range ✅
UI: Report has Regenerar, Imprimir, Descargar PDF buttons ✅
critical_code_review_comments: Route /valuacion mentioned in PRD but actual route is /valuar - consider updating documentation
seed_data_creation: Used existing valuation val_5291862e02f7 with 14 AI-generated comparables
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI-powered comparable search is working correctly. Key test valuation: val_5291862e02f7 shows search_method='ai' and ai_providers_used=['openai','gemini'] with 14 comparables. The form route is /valuar (not /valuacion). Backend logs show both OpenAI GPT-4o and Gemini 2.5 Flash being called successfully. AI search takes ~15-30 seconds. If AI fails, system falls back to scraping then simulated data.

landing_page.details: PropValu branding, 71+ valuations, 95% precision, CNBV/SHF/INDAABIN methodology badge

map_component.features: LocationMap with draggable pin, search input, coordinates display, click-to-move pin

mocked_apis.ai_integration: OpenAI GPT-4o and Gemini 2.5 Flash are REAL integrations via emergentintegrations.llm.chat
mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all AI calls are real through EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
